items.title: Build a local coding agent
items.oneliner: Step-by-step macOS guide to run a local coding agent with llama.cpp, GGUF models, and an OpenAI-compatible API.

items.title: Run a lightweight Erlang task queue
items.oneliner: SQLite-backed Erlang queue you can deploy with Docker for durable jobs without Redis, Kafka, or extra SDKs.

items.title: Use an open Jira alternative
items.oneliner: Open source project tracker that treats AI agents like teammates for sprint planning, specs, and task updates.

items.title: Query analytics in pure Clojure
items.oneliner: In-memory columnar database for Clojure that uses primitive arrays and SQL-like queries for fast local analytics.

items.title: Add live chat to any site
items.oneliner: Open source widget that turns any webpage into a shared room with real-time presence and ephemeral conversations.

items.title: Try the latest Datasette alpha
items.oneliner: Datasette 1.0 alpha adds practical query and usability improvements for publishing, exploring, and sharing SQLite data.

items.title: Inspect Datasette JSON extras
items.oneliner: Paste a Datasette URL to discover supported JSON extras, with syntax highlighting and shareable explorer links.

items.title: Inject async dependencies in Python
items.oneliner: Python utility library for wiring asynchronous dependencies cleanly, now updated with performance and usability improvements.

items.title: Compile LaTeX with Tectonic
items.oneliner: Self-contained Rust-based TeX engine that fetches packages automatically and produces reproducible PDFs without setup pain.

items.title: Learn the Riemann Hypothesis interactively
items.oneliner: Five-level interactive tutorial that teaches the Riemann Hypothesis with visual explanations instead of dense textbook notation.
